sections.description: A custom WordPress plugin to integrate WooCommerce with The Go Geothermal API.
sections.changelog:
0.6.4

  • Change User and Product Mapping to reflect middleware UI naming convention
  • Enhance customer notes
  • Calculate shipping NET total (excluding VAT) and separate carrTax calculation

0.6.1

  • Improved user synchronization logging and handling for accountRef

0.6.0

  • Updated Sales Order Management UI with enhanced line item display and error indicators

0.5.0

  • Global customer pricing: logged-in users with a price list now see their custom prices site-wide (shop, product pages, cart, checkout) instead of only at checkout
  • New GGT_Customer_Pricing class with API-backed transient caching (1 hour TTL, auto-refresh on login)
  • Removed checkout-only AJAX price application; prices are now set server-side via WooCommerce price filters
  • Clean price display (no strikethrough was/now) for custom-priced products

0.4.2

  • general cleanup
  • add account ref columns in users table
  • add pagination for user fetch

0.4.0

  • Reworked the customer pricing list system and discount applications

0.3.0

  • Reworked product import to handle low system resources
  • added daily cron sync option

0.2.14

  • fix duplicate user

0.2.13

  • api error handling

0.2.12

  • correct special characters on checkout

0.2.11

  • Added custom labels to User Mapping

0.1.8

  • add support for sending notes to api

0.1.7

  • import: add setting to control replacing existing featured image; skip overwrite unless enabled; logging for skips

0.1.5

  • UI: provider filter alignment + taxonomy support

0.1.4

  • orders: unify & harden sales order payload sending for ALL payment methods; add payment_provider + payment_provider_title fields; idempotent meta ggt_sales_order_sent; multi-hook strategy (checkout processed, payment complete, status change) with queued retry + exponential backoff; include provider meta for credit gateway and prevent duplicate sends; add logging + pending order queue.

0.1.3

  • admin: show current product/user field mappings on their tabs; flexible import preview switched to field-first layout (first 3 samples) with full column coverage, tooltips and scroll; dashboard plugin enable toggle and inline notices when disabled or unauthenticated; fix split settings so saving Auth no longer resets other settings.

0.1.2

  • update customer specific prices on checkout

0.1.1

  • update delivery date picker date format

0.1.0

  • add product grouping support on import

0.0.11

  • change api endpoints to new domain

0.0.10

  • add registration fields to woocommerce register form

0.0.8

  • ability to switch between testing and production

0.0.7

  • Added date picker for order delivery and submission/ updating of orders with custom payment status to Go Geothermal as sales orders for all payment methods. Previously, this was only done for credit payments.

0.0.6

  • Init
